Name: Snickers:
Text: Oh. You're just standing there. On the ground. Very impressive.

Name: Snickers:
Text: You do know this world has... levels, right? Things above you? Places you can't reach?

Name: Snickers:
Text: We cats figured this out ages ago. You press the action button and [tornado radius=5 freq=2]JUMP[/tornado]. Simple.

Name: Snickers:
Text: Space or Enter. Either one. Try not to overthink it — it's really not that complicated.

Name: Snickers:
Text: The whole world opens up once you can get off the floor. Not that I expect you to appreciate that.
